description: Fail /harness-audit closed when required auditor outputs are empty.

userStories.title: Add the fail-closed auditor-output gate
userStories.description: As the harness orchestrator, I want /harness-audit to validate required auditor outputs before synthesis so that empty sub-agent returns cannot be mistaken for real findings.
acceptanceCriteria: .claude/skills/harness-audit/SKILL.md adds a validation step before synthesis.
The validation requires each required auditor block to include a non-empty expected start sentinel: PM_FINDINGS, IMP_FINDINGS, CRITIC_FINDINGS, EXP_FINDINGS.
The validation requires each auditor block to include END.
The failure path names missing or empty auditors, emits FAIL-AUDITOR-OUTPUT, skips tier ranking/recommended actions, and still appends the Memory Protocol log.
No source changes are made to the Agent runner.
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-18; added fail-closed auditor-output validation to harness-audit skill.

userStories.title: Guard the contract with an eval probe
userStories.description: As the maintainer, I want a deterministic eval probe for the /harness-audit empty-output gate so future skill edits cannot silently remove it.
acceptanceCriteria: The probe resolves the repository root from BASH_SOURCE[0].
The probe returns REGRESSION when the skill lacks the expected sentinels, FAIL-AUDITOR-OUTPUT, the missing/empty-auditor language, or instructions to skip ranking on failure.
Run the new probe and the eval runner; update evals/RESULTS.md if the runner rewrites it.
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-18; added Tier-A eval probe, refreshed eval results, and updated changelog.
